7:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent observes"}]," an event, conversation turn, or tool result"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," stores the raw entry with metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}]," are updated synchronously (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]," (async) processes entries during sleep cycles"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotion"}]," moves high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extraction"}]," pulls structured facts into Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes low-importance entries per policy"]}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Read Path"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  Q[Query] -->|parse| RE[Retrieval Engine]\n  RE -->|vector| VI[Vector Index]\n  RE -->|text| FI[FTS5 Index]\n  RE -->|graph| TG[Temporal Graph]\n  VI -->|scores| RF[Rank Fusion]\n  FI -->|scores| RF\n  TG -->|triples| RF\n  RF -->|results| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|context| A[Agent]\n"}]
a:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}]," enters the Retrieval Engine"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Parallel dispatch"}]," to vector, text, and graph indices"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}]," combines scores using configurable weights"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," assembles the final context window"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent receives"}]," consolidated, relevant context"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Flow"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  START[Sleep Cycle Trigger] -->|every N seconds| WM2[Scan Working Memory]\n  WM2 -->|select| CAND[Candidates]\n  CAND -->|importance > threshold| PROMOTE[Promote to Episodic]\n  CAND -->|extractable facts| EXTRACT[Extract to Semantic]\n  CAND -->|age > limit| EVICT[Evict]\n  PROMOTE --> COMPRESS[AAAK Compress]\n  COMPRESS --> EM2[Episodic Memory]\n  EXTRACT --> TG2[Temporal Graph]\n  EVICT --> DEL[Remove]\n"}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Event Lifecycle"}]
